meta.title: GEONYX | Urban Environment, Construction & High Technology – Intelligent Mineral Surfaces
meta.description: GEONYX develops jointless mineral systems for urban environments, public buildings, shopping centres, logistics zones and high-tech manufacturing. Resistance to wear, chemistry, load and heavy traffic with long service life and low carbon footprint.

hero.description: From skate parks and cycle paths to aviation hangars and clean rooms – GEONYX designs mineral systems that combine aesthetics, wear resistance and protection from water, chemistry and thermal stress.
zones: Street furniture – benches, planters, decorative elements
Grouting and stabilisation of pavers and paving slabs
Pedestrian areas, staircases and building entrance zones
Underpasses, overpasses and urban underground passages
Metro stations and urban transport stops
Aviation hangars and MRO zones (apron, service areas)
ESD-sensitive electronics zones, clean rooms and laboratories
Data centres and high-tech R&D centres

manifesto.text: In urban and high-tech environments, concrete is not just structure – it is background, stage and critical infrastructure. Scenarios such as skate traffic, salts and UV, aviation fuels, ESD requirements and sensitive electronics cannot be solved with 'ordinary screed'. GEONYX combines ARMOR, HYDRO, CHEM and THERM in systems that withstand dynamic loads, climate, chemistry and fire without sacrificing aesthetics.

b1.title: SKATE PARKS, CYCLE PATHS & IMPACT LOADING
b1.problem: Skate parks and cycle paths combine impact, abrasion and concentrated loads on edges and radii. Ordinary surfaces spall, edges break off and surfaces become uneven and dangerous.
b1.solution: GEONYX ARMOR provides a dense mineral surface with high impact and abrasion resistance. Edge, break and radius details are designed with the same mineral logic so the park withstands long-term friction, impacts and climate.

b2.title: STREET FURNITURE, BENCHES, PLANTERS & DECORATIVE CONCRETE
b2.problem: Benches, planters and decorative elements are exposed to UV, rain, salts and vandalism. Cracks, spalled edges and graffiti stains quickly ruin the visual appeal of public space.
b2.solution: GEONYX ARMOR + HYDRO offer dense, hydrophobised and climate-resistant mineral surfaces. CHEM is added in zones requiring better resistance to cleaning agents and anti-graffiti solutions, while preserving the 'mineral look'.

b3.title: PAVER & SLAB GROUTING WITHOUT WEEDS
b3.problem: Classic sand or weak-mix grouting leads to washout, weeds, mud and displaced pavers. Water penetrates under the surface, freezes and destroys the base.
b3.solution: GEONYX HYDRO + ARMOR offer mineral grouting and filling solutions with high resistance to water and salts. Joints become part of the structure – no weeds and no washout in rain or pressure washing.

b4.title: SCULPTURES, DÉCOR & PUBLIC SPACES
b4.problem: Sculptures and décor in parks, film sets and public spaces must look good and withstand moisture, contamination and impact. Standard renders crack and peel quickly.
b4.solution: GEONYX ARMOR + THERM provide a mineral 'shell' with high mechanical and thermal resistance. HYDRO protects against water, and CHEM allows cleaning with more aggressive agents when needed without sacrificing aesthetics.

b5.title: UNDERPASSES, METRO STATIONS & PUBLIC BUILDINGS
b5.problem: Underpasses and metro stations combine moisture, condensation, shoe salts and heavy foot traffic. Tiles slip, joints blacken and floors wear unevenly.
b5.solution: GEONYX ARMOR + HYDRO create a jointless or minimally jointed mineral floor with controlled anti-slip. THERM adds better behaviour in case of fire, and CHEM allows regular machine cleaning with detergents.

b6.title: TERRACES, PAVING, STAIRS & ENTRANCE ZONES
b6.problem: External terraces and stairs are exposed to rain, UV, ice and salts. Slipping, leaks to rooms below and damaged edges are typical scenarios.
b6.solution: GEONYX HYDRO + ARMOR provide a waterproofing and wear-resistant system with designed grip on steps and landings. Edge, drain and facade connection details are resolved systematically to prevent unexpected leaks.

b7.title: AVIATION HANGARS & MRO ZONES
b7.problem: Aviation hangars combine aviation fuels, hydraulic fluids, heavy bogies and the need for a clean, flat surface. Standard systems suffer from the chemistry and concentrated loads.
b7.solution: GEONYX ARMOR + CHEM provide a mineral system resistant to aviation fluids and heavy bogies. HYDRO protects the structure from spills, and THERM improves fire behaviour of the floor.

b8.title: AUTOMOTIVE & EV ASSEMBLY LINES
b8.problem: In automotive and EV assembly lines, floors handle AGV/AMR traffic, trolleys, robots and process fluid spills. Uneven surfaces and joints cause vibrations and accuracy issues.
b8.solution: GEONYX ARMOR provides flat, wear-resistant surfaces with low vibration, suitable for robots and AGVs. CHEM is added for oil and fluid resistance, and HYDRO is used in wet-cleaning zones.

b9.title: ESD ZONES FOR ELECTRONICS & AVIONICS
b9.problem: In ESD-sensitive zones, sparks and static electricity are a critical risk for components and equipment. Classic floors often do not maintain stable ESD parameters over time.
b9.solution: GEONYX ARMOR + CHEM can be configured as ESD-manageable mineral systems compatible with electronics and avionics requirements, without compromising mechanical resistance and cleanliness.

b10.title: CLEAN ROOMS, DATA CENTRES & LABORATORIES
b10.problem: Clean rooms, data centres and laboratories require control of dust, moisture, ESD and chemistry. Cracks, joints and peeling coatings are unacceptable.
b10.solution: GEONYX ARMOR + HYDRO + CHEM combine flat, clean, easy-to-clean and, where needed, ESD-manageable surfaces resistant to disinfectants and laboratory chemistry. THERM is added in zones with elevated fire requirements.

rows.geonyx: High – ARMOR for impact, friction and traffic

rows.alt: Depends on chemistry, risk of swelling and staining

rows.param: Waterproofing and leaks to lower levels

rows.alt: Gloss that highlights scratches and defects

rows.geonyx: Local REPAIR and zone-by-zone system renewals
rows.standard: Difficult partial repairs, often full replacement

rows.alt: Medium, with risk of early ageing

systems.section_desc: For urban and high-tech environments, GEONYX combines ARMOR, HYDRO, CHEM and THERM depending on whether the primary risk is traffic, climate, chemistry, ESD or fire.

items.name: GEONYX ARMOR
items.desc: High-strength mineral systems for impact, abrasion and intensive pedestrian and wheeled traffic.

items.name: GEONYX HYDRO
items.desc: Solutions for water, precipitation and leaks – from terraces and paving to underground underpasses and metro stations.

items.name: GEONYX CHEM
items.desc: Systems with enhanced chemical resistance for aviation fluids, cleaning agents and laboratory chemistry.

items.name: GEONYX THERM
items.desc: Mineral solutions with better fire behaviour and thermal stress resistance in public and high-tech buildings.

steps.title: Function and traffic analysis
steps.desc: Review of scenarios – urban environment, public access, high-tech zones, ESD/clean requirements.

steps.title: Risk-based zoning
steps.desc: Dividing the site into zones: external areas, internal public zones, high-tech, laboratories, hangars.

steps.title: GEONYX system selection
steps.desc: Combination of ARMOR / HYDRO / CHEM / THERM for each zone with clearly defined parameters.

steps.title: Details and trial zones
steps.desc: Design of details at joints, edges, facades, drains and test sections where needed.

steps.title: Phased execution
steps.desc: Work organisation so the site remains partially operational where possible.

steps.title: Control and training
steps.desc: Final inspection, documentation and maintenance, cleaning and future REPAIR intervention instructions.

offer.section_desc: For municipalities, investors, architects and high-tech facility operators, GEONYX prepares a complete package for tenders, competitions and internal approval.
offer.quality_desc: All documents comply with current Eurocodes and standards.
offer.tender_text: Mineral floors, coatings and protective systems in urban zones, public buildings, aviation hangars, high-tech rooms, clean rooms, ESD zones and data centres shall be executed with mineral systems of GEONYX type or equivalent, combining ARMOR / HYDRO / CHEM / THERM according to functional and operational requirements. Systems must provide high wear resistance, controlled anti-slip, climate and chemical resistance, appropriate fire behaviour and compatibility with ESD/clean requirements of the client.
items: Zoning of urban and high-tech areas by function and risk
Technical specifications for ARMOR / HYDRO / CHEM / THERM by zone
Details for joints, edges, facades, terraces and underground connections
Recommended execution scenario without full site closure
Cleaning, chemical and fire safety requirements
Warranty conditions and inspection and local repair plan

items.question: CAN WE KEEP A 'MINERAL LOOK' RATHER THAN A TYPICAL RESIN FLOOR?
items.answer: Yes. GEONYX systems are mineral and allow a 'mineral look' with high wear resistance and protection. Colour and texture are specified in the project according to the architectural concept.

items.question: ARE THE SYSTEMS SUITABLE FOR ESD AND CLEAN ROOM REQUIREMENTS?
items.answer: Certain ARMOR and CHEM configurations can be delivered with controlled ESD parameters and a smooth, easy-to-clean surface compatible with clean room protocols.

items.question: HOW DO THE FLOORS PERFORM IN A FIRE IN PUBLIC AND HIGH-TECH BUILDINGS?
items.answer: THERM configurations are based on non-combustible mineral systems with favourable fire behaviour; specific classes are defined according to regulations and the project.

cta.title: COMPREHENSIVE SITE ZONING
cta.desc: Every site has specific risks. We integrate 6 specialised matrices into one system: from mechanics, chemistry and thermal shock to waterproofing, anti-static and architecture.
